name: Spice Blend Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a half cup container with a tight-fitting lid, combine all ingredients.
2. Attach the lid securely.
3. Label the container with the date and contents.
4. Store in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 6 months.
6. Makes about 6 tablespoons Spice Blend Mix.
Note: Add one teaspoon or more to cake batters, quick bread batters, whipped cream and pancakes. This blend can be used for any recipe that calls for these spices to add variety.
